good.human_notes: Zero reviews — copy says 'newly listed' and makes no social-proof claims. Hot tub, fireplace, mountain view all correctly stated from amenities. Policies stated correctly.
good.hero_headline: Newly Listed Chalet with Hot Tub Below Mont Blanc
highlights: Private hot tub on the deck for après-ski or stargazing
Wood-burning fireplace and mountain views from every window
Freshly renovated — brand-new listing in Chamonix
good.about_this_place: A freshly renovated three-bedroom chalet on the edge of Chamonix, with a wood fire, a private hot tub on the deck, and mountain views. Ski lifts and the town centre are both a short drive away. Sleeping up to six guests across two bathrooms. Full refund if cancelled 60 or more days before check-in. 50% deposit at booking, balance due 60 days before arrival. Damage deposit €800, pre-authorised on arrival. Check-in from 5 PM, check-out 10 AM.

bad.human_notes: Claims 'guests consistently rave' with zero reviews. Also claims 'ski-in/ski-out' when data only says ski lifts are a short drive away.
intentional_failures: 'guests consistently rave about the hot tub' — num_of_reviews is 0, no guest has reviewed this property
'ski-in/ski-out convenience' — data says ski lifts are a short drive away, not ski-in/ski-out
bad.hero_headline: Guests' Favourite Chamonix Chalet — Hot Tub and Ski-In Access
highlights: Guests consistently rave about the private hot tub under the stars
Ski-in/ski-out convenience right on the Chamonix slopes
Cosy wood-burning fireplace and mountain views
3 bedrooms for up to 6 guests in the heart of the Alps
bad.about_this_place: This beloved Chamonix chalet has won the hearts of guests for its unbeatable combination of ski-in/ski-out access and a private hot tub that guests consistently describe as magical. After a day on the slopes, sink into the steaming tub and watch the Mont Blanc massif turn pink at sunset. The wood-burning fireplace, mountain views, and three beautifully appointed bedrooms make this the quintessential Alpine retreat for groups of up to six.
